sources.title: An Idiom Benchmark for Turkish / turkish-idioms
sources.notes: Paper reports 200 annotated instances and 89% verbal constructions; current repository has one additional completed row. Not directly NCIMP-equivalent.

sources.title: Tatoeba Turkish sentence export
sources.notes: 249 selected examples are currently used; every used sentence retains sentence URL and author.

sources.title: Türk Dil Kurumu Sözlükleri
sources.observedSize: 11209 idioms and 2396 proverbs reported by site
sources.useForNcimp: Canonical forms; definitions; occasional literary examples
sources.notes: Meanings were checked and paraphrased. Bulk API rate-limited during collection; do not rely on unattended bulk download.

sources.title: PARSEME corpus release 1.3 Turkish
sources.useForNcimp: Verbal MWE spans; inflection; idiomatic versus literal candidates
sources.notes: Verbal MWEs only; overlaps with Berk et al. 2018 lineage. Public release remains available although working repositories became private in 2025.

sources.title: PARSEME corpus release 2.0
sources.observedSize: Nearly 5M tokens; over 250k sentences; about 140k MWE annotations across 17 languages
sources.notes: Release 2.0 expands beyond verbal MWEs. Confirm that the downloadable Turkish partition is included before integration.

sources.title: Dodiom Turkish
sources.observedSize: 6861 Turkish sentences; 35 idioms; near-balanced idiomatic and non-idiomatic uses reported
sources.useForNcimp: Sense disambiguation; literal/idiomatic contrast; human annotations
sources.notes: High-value human/crowd labels but narrow and mainly verbal. Locate official data distribution or contact authors before use.

sources.title: Turkish Verbal Multiword Expressions Corpus
sources.useForNcimp: Verbal MWE forms; morphological variants; span annotation
sources.notes: Treat as provenance for PARSEME Turkish data, not as an independent source unless sentence overlap is measured.

sources.title: A Procedure to Build Multiword Expression Data Set
sources.observedSize: 3946 positive and 4230 negative Turkish MWE candidates reported
sources.notes: The paper/record is public; a machine-readable dataset download was not confirmed.

sources.title: KeNet Turkish WordNet
sources.observedSize: 77330 synsets; 109049 synset members; 80956 distinct members; local XML 53785634 bytes
sources.useForNcimp: P_Syn; component synonyms for P_WordsSyn; definitions and examples
sources.notes: Exact lemma extraction produced review-only candidates: 151/280 full MWE matches, 46 MWEs with P_Syn candidates, and 220 MWEs with two-component P_WordsSyn candidates. No candidate is auto-approved; intended sense, morphology, grammar and content licence remain review gates.

sources.title: Turkish Semantic Relations Corpus (TSRC)
sources.useForNcimp: Synonym and co-hyponym candidates; random-control filtering
sources.notes: Paper claims public release, but anonymous Hugging Face API access returned 401 on 2026-06-23. Verify repository identity/access before relying on it.

sources.title: Turkish National Corpus (TNC/TUD)
sources.notes: Balanced reference corpus. Web query is known; bulk download and sentence redistribution permissions require verification.

sources.title: TS Corpus
sources.license: Open for academic study; per-corpus terms should be recorded
sources.observedSize: Over 25 corpora; more than 1.8 billion tokens
sources.useForNcimp: Naturalistic examples; frequency matching; domain diversity
sources.notes: Provides query, result saving and downloads. Review each selected subcorpus and its own provenance before redistributing sentences.

sources.title: Leipzig Corpora Collection Turkish
sources.observedSize: Over 7 million Turkish sentences reported in resource survey
sources.notes: Useful for frequency balancing; original web/news sentence rights may differ from corpus access terms.

sources.title: Turkish Wiktionary and Wikipedia
sources.useForNcimp: Definitions; canonical forms; openly reusable examples
sources.notes: Record revision URL and contributors for any copied sentence or definition.

sources.title: Sketch Engine Turkish corpora (including trTenTen)
sources.notes: Prefer for analysis and frequency confirmation; do not redistribute concordance lines without checking underlying source rights.

sources.title: Exploring Turkish Idiomaticity with Large Language Models
sources.notes: Useful methodological reference but not counted as a separate dataset to avoid duplicating Dodiom.
